title: Bombshell Twist in USF Double Murder Case
body: I live in Hillsborough County, Tampa, and my husband works as a faculty member at USF. Everyone is shocked, extremely devastated, and sad. USF is considering new regulations for student housing apartments, potentially including background checks and details about both student and non-student tenants. My heart goes out to their loved ones, especially parents.
author: @royadartube

title: Bombshell Twist in USF Double Murder Case
body:
Phd students from that part of the world to come to the USA means a lot of sacrifices from their parents to the children. Even a flight ticket is an uphill. How much hope these and their parents and their families would have had…
If their families had the slightest knowledge of these kids being in the slightest of a danger they would have asked the kids to come back. Who knows how much they could have contributed to the USA in the future….
Incomprehensible that this kind of warped minds can be produced by societies…
author: @rahuthan7195

title: Bombshell Twist in USF Double Murder Case
body: Just a heads-up for international students looking for shared housing: Please make sure to do a background check on your housemates. No matter how great the deal sounds, it's crucial to get police verification for your safety.

title: Bombshell Twist in USF Double Murder Case
body: As an American of Bangladeshi origin and someone who is currently visiting Bangladesh, this news just broke my heart. It is saddening and deeply frustrating. This is a big news in Bangladesh right now and pretty much every major newspaper and tv channels are focusing on the updates coming out form the US on this issue. Both Zamil and Brishty were extremely talented and getting the opportunity to study in the US was dream come true for them. They had so much to offer and so much to live for. My sincere condolences to their families.

title: He Used ChatGPT to Plan a Double Murder | The USF Bangladeshi Students Case | Maruf Hayath
body:
🔴 UPDATEs & Sponsor ‼️


⭕ প্রথমেই বলি, এই ভিডিও টা কিন্তু আমি এডিট করিনি, this was edited by someone else, you can tell by the style i guess. Anyway Still looking for a good editor so i can post more often. Here is the google form - https://forms.gle/NHkxP35FaycqFpYg7


A BIG Shoutout to @forensicbd


Visit their website to know more 👇

🌐website: https://forensicbd.org

or 📞 Call: 01988896656


📌 ভিডিও রেকর্ড করার পরে যেসব নতুন আপডেট এসেছে 


✅সবচেয়ে বড় আপডেট: মে ৭ তারিখে Hillsborough County এর Grand Jury হিশাম আবুঘারবিয়েহ কে officially indict করেছে। Grand rjury confirm করেছে যে সে লিমন ও ব্রিস্টিকে "blunt force injuries এবং stabbing, slicing and cutting" এর মাধ্যমে হত্যা করেছে। Weapon হিসেবে knife বা sharp object ব্যবহার করা হয়েছে বলে allegation করা হয়েছে।

 

তবে হিশাম সব charges এ not guilty plea দিয়েছে। মানে সে দোষ স্বীকার করেনি, সে নিজেকে এখনো নির্দোষ দাবী করছে।


✅ Chat Gpt তে দুটো নতুন সার্চ কুয়েরি পাওয়া গেছে। হিশাম search করেছিল "Can a knife penetrate a skull?" এবং "Can you bury a body in a trash bag?" এই searches গুলো murders এর আগের দিন করা হয়েছিল।


✅ ব্রিস্টির বডি অফিশিয়ালি আইডেন্টিফাইড হয়েছে। মে ১ তারিখে Sheriff Chad Chronister officially confirm করেছেন যে mangroves এ পাওয়া remains নাহিদা সুলতানা ব্রিস্টির। DNA, dental records এবং last seen footage এর same clothing দিয়ে identification confirm হয়েছে। Body টা একজন kayaker আবিষ্কার করেছিলেন যার fishing line mangroves এ আটকে গিয়েছিল।


✅দুজনের বডি বাংলাদেশে পাঠানো হয়ে গেছে অলরেডি। 



🔴সবচেয়ে বড় প্রশ্ন, কেন খুন করেছে ?


✅মোটিভ এখনো অজানা, কারন হিশাম খুন ই অস্বীকার করছে। তবে লিমনের ভাই Zubaer এর theory অনুযায়ী, এটা একটা ছোট household dispute থেকে trigger হয়েছিল। সে বলেছে একটা soap/ Kitchen এর ডিশ ওয়াশ নিয়ে ঝগড়া হয়েছিল। হয়ত কেউ একজন হিশামের সাবান/ডিশওয়াশ ইউস করেছিল, এইজন্যে ঝগড়া । তবে লিমন ঝগড়ার পরে হিশামকে নতুন সাবান/ডিশওয়াস কিনেও দিয়েছিল।


 এটা শুধু Zubaer এর personal theory,  officially confirmed না।  আবার কমপ্লেইনের কোন ইস্যু ও হতে পারে। 


🔴 লিমন আর তার রুম মিলে কি জানতে পারে এবং কি কমপ্লেইন করেছিল ?


কি জানতে পারে এবং কমপ্লেইন আসলে কি ছিল এইটা একদম ক্লিয়ার করে কোথাও পাওয়া যায় না। তবে ধারনা করা যায়, হিশামের ক্রাইম রেকর্ডের হিস্ট্রি । আর হিশাম ত রানিং স্টুডেন্ট না, সে ড্রপ আউট, তাও ওখানে থাকছিল । ২০২৩ এ তার ছাত্রত্ব শেষ ছিল। তার পরিবার পর্যন্ত তার বিরুদ্ধে কেইস করে রেখেছে । এগুলো হতে পারে। তবে আবার ও বলি, এগুলো অনুমান- কেইসের ট্রায়াল শুরু হলে মামলার রায় প্রকাশের পর ই সব জানা যাবে আপাতত, কিছু প্রশ্নের উত্তর আপাতত unanswered ই থাকবে।


🔴 এই কেস এখনো চলছে এই মুহূর্তে কোন future court date scheduled নেই। Trial শুরু হতে ১৮-৩৬ মাস লাগতে পারে। Death penalty pursue করা হবে কিনা সেটা indictment এর পর State Attorney decide করবেন। 

আমি এই কেস actively follow করছি, নতুন কিছু আসলে এখানেই আপডেট দিব unless the update is so big that it changes the whole story we know till now, in that case আরেকটা ভিডিও রিলিজ করতে হবে।


⭕ Trial শুরু হবে November 2027 তে, মানে আরো দেড় বছর অপেক্ষা।


🙏 লিমন ও ব্রিস্টির আত্মার মাগফিরাত কামনা করি।

body: Love being an Owl alumni! It’s a completely different campus than when I was there, there was no engineering building, they hadn’t built the gym and new pool until my senior year, and we still had to drive to some random high school stadium 30 minutes away because the stadium hadn’t been built. The rapid development of that campus has been amazing to watch, and I love getting tickets that have access to the full service bar IN THE STADIUM! How awesome is that?!

title: The TRUTH About USC… #usc #college #collegelife #university
body:
I was middle class and got accepted into USC…

Half my school was scholarships, the other half loans.

I had a full time job while going to school there.

In fact, all my close friends I met there were also middle class…

Everyone being rich who goes there isn’t true.

But, my maid did go to UCLA!

✌🏻

title: Ranking EVERY Florida College #college #university #collegelife #fsu #uf
body:
UCF’s biggest plus is it’s in Orlando. You’re going to naturally have a good night life and plenty to do. As someone from South Florida it was the perfect distance from family to have some separation while also being close enough that going home for breaks and holidays wasn’t too much of a hassle.

Biggest downside is the massive student body. Parking is a mess and if you’re not a social butterfly it can be intimidating.

title: MORNING IN MY LIFE AT THE UNIVERSITY OF ALABAMA | friday morning vlog
body: For everyone saying she is a kid of a rich family. She runs all of her social media platforms alone which make you gain a lot of money. Her BMW is a hand me down from her mom from 2010. Most of her skincare is PR. She does really nice videos about all of the unboxing and that is where most of her skincare and make up is from. In her Amazon storefront you can see some of the things that she used to decorate her room and they do not cost an insane amount of money. I think we should be happy for her and also appreciate the things that we have in life, without looking so much into others people life and choosing either to say if the person grew up rich or poor.
author: @rjfxf

title: MORNING IN MY LIFE AT THE UNIVERSITY OF ALABAMA | friday morning vlog
body: yall need to watch her actual videos before you comment ignorant things. her bmw is a hand me down, this room is in a college sorority house, and she works hard to buy HERSELF the things she wants. all of this i learned from like 2 videos.

title: USF CAMPUS TOUR!
body: If you are willing, I would really love if you could just show us the outside+ inside of a specific building for each video and make it like a little series... if it is possible. I am a lot more interested in just the engineering/ architecture building but why not do it all lol.
author: @Naturebeautifaul

title: USF CAMPUS TOUR!
body: USF is actually pretty huge. There are 3 hospitals on campus, a whole bank, and many outpatient centers. I went there for undergrad and Nursing school. What Carlos showed you was a little glance of USF as a whole. It is in the top 15 largest Universities nationwide. I had a great experience as a student. I recommend it to everyone. Also, there is news that black students who went there did pretty well compared to any other Universities nationwide including HBCUs.
author: @JessJayEel
